zh.Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Fr: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維其勒
zh.Église Collégiale De Saint-André, Chartr: 法國崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Guigues VI於1184年出生時，他的父親Hugues III de Bourgogne36歲，母親Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois22歲。他和Beatrice Sabran至少有1個女兒。他去世於1237年3月14日享年53歲，埋葬在法國崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Guigues VI于1184年出生时，他的父亲Hugues III de Bourgogne36岁，母亲Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois22岁。他和Beatrice Sabran至少有1个女儿。他去世于1237年3月14日享年53岁，埋葬在法国崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Guigues VI was born in 1184, his father, Hugues III de Bourgogne, was 36 and his mother, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, was 22. He had at least 1 daughter with Beatrice Sabran. He died on 14 March 1237, at the age of 53, and was buried in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Guigues VI est né en 1184, son père, Hugues III de Bourgogne, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Beatrice Sabran. Il est décédé le 14 mars 1237, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Guigues VI 1184 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues III de Bourgogne 36 und seine Mutter Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois 22. Er hatte mit Beatrice Sabran mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. März 1237 im Alter von 53 Jahren und wurde in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Guigues VI è nato il nel 1184, il suo padre, Hugues III de Bourgogne, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Beatrice Sabran. Morì il 14 marzo 1237, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.

ja.Vizille, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Fr: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアヴィズイル
ja.Burgundy, France: フランスボウルゴグン
ja.Église Collégiale De Saint-André, Chartr: フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチャートレス
ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Guigues VIが1184年に生まれた時，父Hugues III de Bourgogneは36歳，母Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennoisは22歳であった。彼はBeatrice Sabranとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1237年3月14日に53歳で死去し，フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチャートレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Guigues VI(이)가 1184년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues III de Bourgogne(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Beatrice Sabran(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 3월 14일 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 처트레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Guigues VI nasceu em 1184, seu pai, Hugues III de Bourgogne, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Beatrice Sabran. Ele faleceu em 14 de março de 1237, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Guigues VI родился в 1184 г., его отцу по имени Hugues III de Bourgogne было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, 22. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Beatrice Sabran. Он умер 14 марта 1237 г. в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности чартресь, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Guigues VI nació en 1184, su papá, Hugues III de Bourgogne, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Beatrice Sabran. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1237, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.
